title: Dog Coats❄️
description: Ever wanted your cold pet to have a ugly winter sweater? Ask no more! Your pet will be the warmest cute pet with this resource pack!
body:
![Example1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bbd8482f7c06f8deff6aadc425e214cb247f7fc_0.webp)

Ever wanted your cold pet to have a ugly winter sweater? Ask no more! Your pet will be the warmest cute pet with this resource pack!
YT Channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/TheGentooGamer

Check out this packs sister pack "Cat Coats❄️": https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cat-coats

And my other winter based pack, "Snowy Sounds and Rain add-on!❄️: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/snowy-sounds-and-rain-add-on!
